hero.label: Contact
hero.sub: Whether you're building a digital health product that needs to hold up to clinical scrutiny, or investing in the organisations doing that work, every conversation starts by understanding what you're actually trying to achieve.

form.msgLabel: What are you trying to achieve?
form.msgPlaceholder: A sentence or two on where you are and what's on your mind.
form.sentBody: Every message reaches me directly. Expect an honest reply within a couple of working days.

info.title: An honest conversation
info.body: No pitch, no hard sell. We start by understanding what you're trying to achieve and whether I'm the right person to help.

info.title: Grab a time that works
info.body: Skip the form and put a slot in the diary.

info.title: Three ways to work together
info.body: Retainer advisory · Three-month sprint · Workshop & keynote.
